title: Contract Executive (6-months Contract), HR Business Partner
description:
Why Join

Imagine building a thriving workplace where people feel valued and empowered. As an HR Business Partner at OCBC, you’ll be a trusted advisor, shaping our people strategy and directly impacting our success. You’ll enjoy tackling complex challenges, fostering strong relationships, and driving positive change – all within Singapore’s longest established and highly-rated bank.

How you succeed

You’ll succeed by becoming a true business partner, deeply understanding our objectives and proactively aligning people strategies to achieve them. Build trust with managers and employees by providing clear, pragmatic guidance. Champion OCBC’s values and HR programs, ensuring consistent application and continuous improvement. You’ll navigate complex situations with empathy and sound judgment, always focusing on solutions.

What you do

Here’s a glimpse of your day:

  • Guide managers and employees on all people-related matters.

  • Partner with leaders to develop and implement HR initiatives.

  • Manage employee performance issues, including disciplinary action.

  • Analyse HR data to identify trends and inform decisions.

  • Support daily HR operations, ensuring a smooth employee experience.

  • Collaborate with HR specialists to enhance people capabilities

​Who you work with

Group Human Resources is at the forefront of our ongoing transformation. Building the future-ready workforce, building the future of banking. Driving culture. Empowering individuals. Enabling teams. Creating conditions for 29,000 people to thrive. Upskilling. Reskilling. Making the idea of a learning organisation reality. Investing in technology. Bringing more of the right people in. Helping find and realise their personal best once they are here.

Who you are

  • You’ve a minimum of 10 years’ experience as a dedicated HR Business Partner.

  • You possess a university degree in any discipline.

  • You excel at building relationships and influencing stakeholders.

  • You’re analytical, data-driven, and comfortable with metrics.

  • You communicate exceptionally, both verbally and in writing.

  • You’re resourceful and thrive in challenging, fast-paced environments.

  • You’re a proactive problem solver with strong judgment and discretion.

postedCompany.description:
The longest-established Singapore bank, we’ve been helping people and businesses get what they want from life since 1932. How? By taking the time to truly understand their needs. And it starts with looking after our people. With a motivated, purpose-driven culture. Looking after your well-being. Providing continuous holistic growth. 


Today, we are on a journey of transformation. Pioneering banking solutions with a future-ready mindset. Unleashing the creativity and ambition of our people though the largest-of-its-kind open-learning program. Harnessing the power of seamless data and technology to create first-to-market products and services. Partnering with sustainability innovators. Financing green technologies. Working in close-knit collaborative teams. Where you feel included and in complete control of your career growth. Now and into the future. 


We are recognised as one of the World's Top 50 Safest Banks by Global Finance. And the best-managed bank in Singapore and Asia Pacific by The Asian Banker. From this foundation of financial strength and robust technology, we serve 3.5 million people across Asia. Our footprint covers over 1,000 branches throughout Singapore, Malaysia, Indonesia, China, Hong Kong and Macao.  


Now it's time to launch your career at the forefront of banking. Whether you want to innovate needs-based financial services. Find the best version of yourself in a friendly, supportive team. Build lasting value in your community. Help people grow their assets, business, and investments. Take your learning as far as you can. Or simply enjoy a vibrant, future-ready career, your Opportunity Starts Here.
postedCompany.name: OVERSEA-CHINESE BANKING CORPORATION LIMITED

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
